channel.title: extra-ransom, super-chainsaw – Woodworking
channel.description: Recent content in Woodworking on extra-ransom, super-chainsaw

item.title: Furniture Plans
item.description:
Plans and references for furniture builds. Add plans here as projects come together.

Pages

  • Cherry Hallway Console (Proposed) — narrow entry console, mortise-and-tenon cherry, drawbored — designed, not yet built

item.title: 3D-Printed Shop Tools
item.description: Printable jigs and shop tools for woodworking projects — the woodworking counterpart to the rodmaking tool set.

item.title: Tool Links
item.description: Tools, suppliers, and references worth keeping track of. Add links here as they come up.
